title: NTPC – Engineering Executive Trainee – 52 Posts
shortInfo: NTPC Recruitment 2026 offers 52 vacancies for Engineering Executive Trainee posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 29-05-2026 through the official NTPC website, ntpc.co.in.

basic_details.job_title: NTPC EET Recruitment 2026 Through GATE 2025 - Apply Online for 52 Engineering Executive Trainee Posts
basic_details.short_information: NTPC Recruitment 2026 offers 52 vacancies for Engineering Executive Trainee posts. Eligible candidates with B.Tech can apply online from 15-05-2026 to 29-05-2026 through the official NTPC website, ntpc.co.in.

application_fee.general_fee: No application fee for Civil/Construction Engineering; Rs. 300/- for General/EWS/OBC-NCL for Mining

selection_process: Shortlisting based on GATE-2025 score + Document Verification + Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online on the website https://careers.ntpc.co.in in the "All Careers" section using their GATE-2025 registration number. No other mode of application will be entertained. Before applying, candidates must ensure they hold a valid GATE-2025 score card and meet all eligibility criteria. The online application system will generate a unique application number which must be noted for future reference. Candidates must upload all required documents in the prescribed format at the time of online application. The GATE-2025 score card, if filled up correctly, will be reflected as appearing in the score card — no request with respect to change in any data entered will be entertained once the application is submitted successfully.
seo_tags: National Thermal Power Corporation Engineering Executive Trainee Recruitment 2026
